name: Baseten
description: Registers Baseten Model APIs as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model and embedding discovery.

env.description: Fallback Baseten API key used for discovery, inference, and embeddings when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Baseten API key
settings.description: Baseten API key used for model discovery, inference, and embeddings. Falls back to BASETEN_API_KEY.

providers.name: Baseten
providers.description: Refreshes Baseten Model APIs chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.

providers.name: Baseten Embeddings
providers.description: Refreshes Baseten embedding models from the upstream catalog and provides embeddings through Baseten's OpenAI-compatible embeddings endpoint.
